### Props

| Name       | Type      | Required | Default          | Description                                                                                                |
| ---------- | --------- | -------- | ---------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `position` | `string`  |          | `'bottom-right'` | Viewport corner at which to anchor the button.                                                             |
| `visible`  | `boolean` |          | `true`           | Controls button visibility. Set to false when the chat panel is open so the FAB does not visually compete. |

### Events

| Name    | Payload | Description |
| ------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `click` | —       |             |
